title: Extend your stay in Canada (visitor record) - Canada.ca
content:
## Extend your stay in Canada (visitor record)
If you want to extend your stay in Canada as a visitor (stay in Canada longer), you need to apply for a visitor record .
A visitor record is not a visa .
Processing times will vary based on
- the type of application
- if the application is complete
- how quickly we expect to process applications we’ve already received
- how easily we can verify your information
- how long you take to respond to any requests or concerns
Your processing time may also be affected if more people apply to immigrate to Canada than we can bring in
            each year.
Learn how processing times are calculated .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
